title: Mighty Meaty Croatian Lamb Kebabs
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring lamb, cheese, and apple cider vinegar, with a unique tempering chocolate twist and ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the kebabs for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees
While the kebabs are cooking, melt the chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval
Once the kebabs are done, brush them with the melted chocolate
Serve the kebabs hot, topped with crumbled feta cheese
